# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-014](task-0081): Provider Rate Limiting

## Purpose

Implement provider rate limiting.

## Scope

- Rate limit logic
- Throttling
- Retry

## Implementation

1. Implement limits
2. Add throttling
3. Add retry

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Limits work
2. Throttling works
3. Retry works
